title: Salesforce India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Salesforce India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Salesforce India:
Salesforce India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
